compressed_prompt: Write an angry tweet about a friend who is always late to events or appointments. draft a 280-char rant on social media, no emojis, direct, no sarcasm, focus on frustration over chronic lateness
response: "Can't believe my friend is late again, this is the third time this month, it's not just a minor issue, it's a sign of disrespect for other people's time, when will they learn to be punctual and show up on time?"
